diet: Increase daily calorie intake with healthy foods
Eat protein-rich foods like eggs, chicken, paneer, and lentils
Include healthy fats like nuts, peanut butter, and ghee
Eat 5–6 small meals instead of 2–3 large meals
Drink milk, smoothies, or banana shakes daily
Add complex carbs like rice, oats, and whole wheat
workout: Focus on strength training (dumbbells, push-ups, squats)
Train 4–5 times per week with progressive overload
Avoid excessive cardio to prevent calorie loss
Target major muscle groups (chest, legs, back)
lifestyle: Sleep at least 7–8 hours daily for muscle recovery
Stay consistent with meals and workouts
Avoid stress and maintain a positive mindset

diet: Reduce sugar and processed food intake
Eat more vegetables, fruits, and fiber-rich foods
Increase protein intake to stay full longer
Drink green tea or lemon water
Control portion sizes and avoid overeating
workout: Add HIIT workouts for faster fat burning
Train at least 4–5 days per week
Stay active throughout the day (not just workouts)
lifestyle: Avoid stress eating and emotional eating
